author: ibarv
description: Implement multi-line selection via line-number regions. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: ibaru
manifest.description: Implement multi-line selection via line-number regions.
manifest.name: line-multi-selector

name: line-multi-selector

releases.author: ibarv
releases.description:
### Features
- Select an entire line by clicking its line number.
- Toggle non-contiguous line selections with Ctrl/Cmd + Click.
- Select contiguous ranges with Shift + Click or mouse drag.
- Preserve appended selections in the remembered selection set.

### Assets
- main.js
- manifest.json
